_SSA_NOTE: Phase-1 (fresh rebuild) scraper config. The legacy Ollama keys above (MODEL/API_URL/etc.) belong to the OLD pipeline and are untouched. ssa.* reads only the SSA block below plus USER_AGENTS/REQUEST_DELAY/MAX_RETRIES.

SSA._EDGAR_NOTE: SEC fair-access REQUIRES a real contact email in the UA. This was seeded from the repo owner's git email — CONFIRM or replace it. A placeholder/bad UA risks an SEC IP block.
SSA.GDELT_QUERY: ("data center" OR "data centre" OR datacenter OR "AI chip" OR "AI accelerator" OR hyperscaler OR "grid capacity") sourcelang:english
SSA._TRIAGE_NOTE: Phase-2 triage (hosted Gemini, PAID). Key from GOOGLE_API_KEY env var or gitignored .env — NEVER committed. Prices are $/1M tokens for spend-cap math and estimates; verified 2026-07-02 (gemini-3.1-flash-lite GA) — update if Google changes them.
SSA._BIZTOC_NOTE: Phase-1b firehose: full body of every unread feed link. MAX_ARTICLES 0 = no cap (the feed itself bounds the batch); capping is logged. Bodies truncated to MAX_BODY_CHARS.
